description: Executed TASK-NEXT-FROM-BASELINE-0001 consolidated architecture specification creation. Created governance/consolidated_architecture_v3_v4_v5.md on main branch combining v3+v4+v5 governance board components with clear separation: (1) Immutable master prompt policy section establishing SSOT: MASTER_PROMPT_v164_CANON_FINAL as invariant system foundation; (2) Mutable operational artifacts section covering workflow files, ledger entries, and task execution outputs; (3) Governance board architecture integrating v3 role-based routing, v4 verification chains, and v5 autonomous operation protocols; (4) Clear boundaries between policy enforcement (immutable) and execution state (mutable); (5) Consolidated event flow patterns ensuring schema v164 compliance across all governance components. Architecture specification provides unified framework for autonomous multi-agent DevOps operations while maintaining strict separation of concerns between system invariants and operational state.
